title: My First Best Friend
message: Before I knew what friendship meant, I already had you beside me.

title: Childhood
message: If I could relive one chapter of my life, it would always include you.

title: Thank You
message: For every time you cared without expecting anything back... thank you.

title: The Fracture Days
message: When my hand was broken, your care quietly healed my heart too.

title: Our Fights
message: Every argument eventually became another story for us to laugh about.

title: Your Smile
message: Some smiles brighten a room. Yours always brightens my day.

title: Zoo Memory
message: A cheetah behind us... but the happiest memory was standing beside you.

title: Festivals
message: Bathukamma, Diwali, birthdays... every celebration became brighter because you were there.

title: Growing Up
message: Years passed quietly, but our bond only became stronger.

title: The Little Things
message: Funny selfies, random walks, silly reels... they became the biggest treasures.

title: Home
message: Wherever you are, a little piece of home always exists there for me.

title: A Promise
message: No matter how old we become, I'll always be your annoying little brother.

title: Always
message: Distance may change our addresses, but never our relationship.

title: One Wish
message: May every tear you shed in life be nothing but tears of happiness.

title: My Lucky Star
message: Among billions of people in this world, I was lucky enough to have you as my sister.

title: Forever
message: Some relationships are written by destiny. Ours is one of my greatest blessings.
